name: SCC_GetCertificateChainData
title: SCC_GetCertificateChainData
syntax: void SCC_GetCertificateChainData ( long Target, char IdAttr[], long& SubCertificateCount )
description: Reads Id (to the output buffer) and number of sub certificates (via reference) of the target certificate chain. The ID is only available for ISO 15118.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Set this according to the type of certificate chain that is queried:
